    D

    DataReader<T> - Schnittstelle in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.io.input.dataReader
    Generic interface for importing external data into the system.
    dataService - Variable in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config.CryptanalysisGAConfig
    Service providing cipher text and statistical data.
    dataService - Variable in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config.KnapsackGAConfig
    Data service for loading item weights and values from CSV or other sources.
    DataService<T> - Schnittstelle in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.service
    Defines a service for transforming raw CSV input data into a list of Individual objects suitable for use in evolutionary algorithms.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea
    Root package for the IntegrEA Genetic Algorithm Framework.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config
    Contains configuration models and parsing logic that bind TOML settings to the engine.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.controller - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.controller
    Contains the main execution controllers and initialization factories for the Genetic Algorithm framework.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.exceptions - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.exceptions
    Contains custom exception classes representing specific failure states in the framework.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga
    The core Genetic Algorithm domain package.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core
    Contains the fundamental, problem-agnostic building blocks of the Darwinian evolutionary engine.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover
    Contains implementations of the Crossover operator for the Darwinian Engine.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation
    Contains implementations of the Mutation operator for the Darwinian Engine.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.selection - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.selection
    Contains implementations of the Selection operator for the Darwinian Engine.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems
    Contains the concrete problem domain implementations executed by the Genetic Algorithm.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.cryptanalysis - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.cryptanalysis
    Implementation of the Cryptanalysis substitution cipher solver.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.knapsack - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.knapsack
    Implementation of the Knapsack optimization problem.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.sudoku - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.sudoku
    Implementation of the Sudoku puzzle problem.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.symreg - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.symreg
    Implementation of the Symbolic Regression problem.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.tsp - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.tsp
    Implementation of the Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP).
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.io - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.io
    Contains input/output operations for the Genetic Algorithm framework.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.io.input - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.io.input
    Contains classes responsible for loading external data files.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.io.input.dataReader - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.io.input.dataReader
    Contains the raw readers capable of interpreting text and CSV structure.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.service - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.service
    Contains core application services for processing and mutating external data.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.service.csv - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.service.csv
    Contains domain-specific CSV parser services.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ui - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ui
    Contains the user interface boundaries of the framework.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ui.console - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ui.console
    Contains standard console output implementations.
    de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ui.console.texts - Package de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ui.console.texts
    Contains constant text templates and error strings used across the console UI.
    decrypt(String, Chromosome) - Methode in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.cryptanalysis.CryptanalysisFitnessFunction
    Decrypts the ciphertext using the given substitution key.

    mutate(Chromosome) - Methode in Schnittstelle de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation.Mutation
    Applies a specific perturbation algorithm to the given chromosome.
    mutate(Chromosome) - Methode in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation.SimpleMutation
    Mutates the chromosome by replacing every gene with a random value from the mutation range.
    mutate(Chromosome) - Methode in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation.SwapMutation
    Applies swap mutation by exchanging two randomly selected genes.
    mutate(Chromosome) - Methode in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation.UniformMutation
    Mutates the chromosome by replacing genes with random values from the mutation range based on the configured mutation probability.
    mutation - Variable in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config.CryptanalysisGAConfig
    Mutation operator used to introduce variation.
    mutation - Variable in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config.KnapsackGAConfig
    Mutation operator used to introduce variation.
    mutation - Variable in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config.SudokuGAConfig
     
    mutation - Variable in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config.SymRegGAConfig
     
    mutation - Variable in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config.TSPGAConfig
    Mutation operator used to introduce variation in tours.
    Mutation<T> - Schnittstelle in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation
    Contract for inducing random genetic alterations into a given chromosome.

    Probability that mutation is applied to offspring.
    mutationRate - Variable in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config.KnapsackGAConfig
    Probability that mutation is applied to offspring.

    Probability that mutation is applied to offspring.
    mutationRateIsOutOfBounds - Statische Variable in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ui.console.texts.GeneticAlgorithmErrorTexts
    Warning shown when the mutation rate is outside the valid range 0–1.

    O

    OnePointCrossover<T> - Klasse in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover
    Description: Randomly selects a single division point along the genome length.
    OnePointCrossover() - Konstruktor für Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover.OnePointCrossover
     
    onFinish() - Methode in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.controller.GAController
    Called once after the GA terminates.
    OrderedCrossover<T> - Klasse in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover
    Description: Extracts a contiguous sub-sequence of genes from one parent and maps them directly into the offspring at the exact same index.
    OrderedCrossover() - Konstruktor für Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover.OrderedCrossover

    parsimonyCoefficient - Variable in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config.SymRegGAConfig

    A DataReader implementation for importing plain text files.

    PointAndSubtreeMutation - Klasse in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation
    Description: A composite operator that randomly toggles (50/50 chance) between executing a delicate PointMutation (tweaking a single value) or a destructive SubtreeMutation (grafting a brand new random branch).
    PointAndSubtreeMutation(int, int, boolean) - Konstruktor für Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation.PointAndSubtreeMutation
     
    PointMutation - Klasse in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation
    Description: Traverses an AST to pick a single node and perturbs it without altering the underlying tree structure.
    PointMutation() - Konstruktor für Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation.PointMutation

    Represents a population of individuals in a genetic algorithm.

    random - Variable in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config.CryptanalysisGAConfig
    Random number generator used by GA components.
    random - Variable in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config.KnapsackGAConfig
    Random number generator used by GA components.
    replaceNode(SymRegNode, SymRegNode, SymRegNode) - Statische Methode in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.symreg.TreeHelper
    Rebuilds the tree, replacing a specific target node with a replacement.
    RouletteSelection<T> - Klasse in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.selection
    Description: A selection operator that simulates spinning a roulette wheel where the size of each "slice" is proportional to an individual's raw fitness score.
    RouletteSelection() - Konstruktor für Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.selection.RouletteSelection
     
    run() - Methode in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.controller.GAController
    Executes the full GA lifecycle: initialization repeated evaluation and evolution termination and finalization This method is final to ensure consistent GA execution flow across all controllers.

    S

    saveState(String, String) - Methode in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.controller.GAController
    Saves the current evolutionary state to the specified file using JSON.
    saveState(String, String, int, Population) - Methode in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.io.StatePersistenceService
     
    select(Population) - Methode in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.selection.LinearRankingSelection
    Selects an individual using linear ranking probabilities.
    select(Population) - Methode in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.selection.RouletteSelection
    Selects an individual based on fitness proportionate probability.
    select(Population) - Methode in Schnittstelle de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.selection.Selection
    Executes a specific selection algorithm (e.g., Tournament, Roulette Wheel) to extract a single candidate.
    select(Population) - Methode in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.selection.StochasticUniversalSelection
    Selects a single individual using stochastic universal sampling.
    select(Population) - Methode in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.selection.TournamentSelection
    Selects the fittest individual from a randomly sampled subset of the population.

    Selection operator used to choose parents for reproduction.
    selection - Variable in Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config.KnapsackGAConfig
    Selection operator used to choose parents.

    Selection operator used to choose parents.

    Contract for selecting an individual from a population to act as a parent for the next generation.

    SubtreeCrossover - Klasse in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover
    Description: Simulates biological crossover by picking a random internal node from both parents and physically swapping the entire trailing sub-branches.
    SubtreeCrossover() - Konstruktor für Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover.SubtreeCrossover
     
    SubtreeMutation - Klasse in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation
    Description: Randomly selects a node within a tree and completely replaces it (and its children) with a brand new, randomly generated subtree.
    SubtreeMutation(int, int, boolean) - Konstruktor für Klasse de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation.SubtreeMutation

    SudokuHybridMutation - Klasse in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.mutation
    Description: A dual-action operator that randomly picks a single 3x3 block and decides whether to cleanly swap two non-fixed cells or aggressively replace a non-fixed cell with a random number (1-9).

    UniformCrossover<T> - Klasse in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover
